recentTweets.text:
You don't make America safer by terrorizing families on their way to work or school.

Trump's cruel ICE raids are tearing communities apart and taking fathers, friends, and neighbors—including many here legally.

Proud to join my Dem colleagues in sending a letter to Sec Mullin

Real security isn't about bombs and bullying. It's about diplomacy, development, and humanitarian leadership.

It's about preventing conflicts before they start, strengthening our alliances, stopping diseases before they reach our shores, and keeping our sons and daughters out of https://t.co/yBkXsvq4C9
https://t.co/XrboPXE28a
My statement on the passage of Republicans' FY27 National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs funding bill: https://t.co/Zj2GjkAapI

Senator Lindsey Graham and I may have disagreed on plenty, but he understood the importance of international alliances, diplomacy, and development. Senator Graham was willing to work across the aisle on this essential work.

That same willingness to find common ground helped us

Palm Beach County's own Coco Gauff gave us another incredible Wimbledon run.

While this chapter ended sooner than she hoped, she showed the talent, grit, and determination that continue to inspire so many.

We can't wait to see what's next. 🎾💙
https://t.co/YEkkM3dsPw

Ending TPS for our Haitian neighbors will tear families apart, hurt our economy, and push essential workers out of our workforce.

I was proud to stand with Haitian families, faith leaders, and advocates to condemn SCOTUS’s harmful decision clearing the way for the Trump Admin to

The renaming of Palm Beach International Airport should have reflected the will of the community—not political dictates from the state.

No one asked the people of Palm Beach County. This decision was made in Tallahassee, overriding the voices of the residents, businesses, and
This Supreme Court ruling is deeply concerning and a threat to the systems and regulations that protect and push our democracy forward. https://t.co/rzExaOsE4q

This is a heartbreaking situation unfolding in our own backyard.

Olga Perez is now separated from her four U.S. citizen children after their father was deported just months ago.

This isn't making our communities safer. It's cruel and we'll keep fighting back.

This is cruel and harmful to young trans people across the country.

They deserve better, period.
https://t.co/sKrET6PrG9

This week, I stood with Palm Beach County's Haitian community because staying silent isn't an option after SCOTUS cleared the way for the Trump Admin to end TPS for Haiti.

I voted in the House to extend this humanitarian protection. Now it's time for the Senate to do the same. https://t.co/BIbvkZQQJS

Yesterday, I stood with Palm Beach County’s Haitian community, local leaders, health care workers, faith leaders, and advocates after the devastating Supreme Court decision allowing Trump to move forward with ending TPS for Haitians.

Our Haitian neighbors are part of the fabric https://t.co/FkCzrsgSGQ

250 years ago, America was born from a promise: liberty, equality, and government of, by, and for the people.

This Fourth of July, we celebrate that promise—and recommit to the work of making it real for every American.

 I hope everyone has a joyous Independence Day full of https://t.co/Cj33GpCwLU

If you're born in the United States, you're an American citizen. Period. End of story.

Yesterday's Supreme Court decision is welcome, but Trump should never have attacked birthright citizenship to begin with.

541,000 asylum seekers are part of Florida's workforce, helping our businesses, caring for our families, and strengthening our communities.

Trump's cruel anti-immigrant agenda hurts our economy and the people who keep it running.

So great to welcome our 2026 Congressional Art Competition winner, Ryder, to Washington!

It was wonderful to have Ryder visit the U.S. Capitol and see his incredible artwork hanging alongside talented students from across the country.

Keep creating, Ryder. Your talent, https://t.co/ADvTUEpHT1

Eleven years ago, Obergefell v. Hodges affirmed marriage equality across America.

Love is love. Families are families. And every person deserves the freedom to live openly, safely, and with dignity.

We will keep fighting to protect LGBTQ+ rights and defend equality for all.

Ending Temporary Protected Status for Haitians is cruel and reckless.

This decision will tear families apart and deal a blow to South Florida’s economy. It will strip our nursing homes, assisted living facilities, hospitals, and home health agencies of thousands of dedicated https://t.co/V4TVGFl7QR
RT @HomelandDems: Oversight is not optional. The Trump Administration is trying to intimidate - and silence- those who demand accountabilit…

Sec. Hegseth has repeatedly removed women and Black officers from promotion lists without any justification. What kind of leadership is that?

Republicans blocked my amendment that would withhold funding until he tells us why.

We’re waiting @SecWar https://t.co/rPxtTx5ilE

Had a great meeting this week with @FLCities, including representatives from Lantana, Lake Clarke Shores, Atlantis, and other cities, towns, and villages across Florida.

Grateful for our continued collaboration to strengthen our state for all Floridians. https://t.co/ZKawpzSNjI

There's an affordable housing crisis in Trump's own backyard, but his priorities couldn't be clearer.

He's playing politics while PBC families struggle to afford a home. The collateral damage? Your paycheck, future, & family.

We need leaders with courage & integrity. Not this. https://t.co/aMJo2yziOE

Millions of dollars in taxpayer-funded, life-saving contraceptives are sitting in warehouses overseas, wasting away because the Trump Administration refuses to distribute them.

But don't worry—Trump found $14.7 million for a reflecting pool. https://t.co/QWyHcB9ChX

My son served two tours as a Marine.

I came to Congress to help keep other people's children from having to go to war.

Bombs, tariffs, and bullying won't make America safer. Diplomacy, development, and humanitarian aid save lives, prevent conflict, and strengthen our security. https://t.co/uXapWn5HZx

Esther Coopersmith was a trailblazer who dedicated her life to opening doors for women & building lasting peace.

Proud to join @RepKamlagerDove in introducing a bill to create a State Department award in Esther's honor, recognizing women who advance Women, Peace, and Security. https://t.co/sR59HZGHpP

When women have a seat at the table, peace lasts longer. This award recognizes that reality and honors a champion of WPS. 

https://t.co/aDaq6CaiM7

A rare moment of common sense: Republicans joined Democrats to pass a housing bill that responds to the affordability crisis facing families across Florida and the nation.

Democrats will keep fighting Trump’s extreme agenda.
 
Republicans should find the courage to do the same.

Busy week with lots of Juneteenth and Pride festivities. Excited to have had the chance to join the Compass Community Center's Stonewall Ball, Boynton Beach's Juneteenth celebration, the Black Women Lawyers Association Juneteenth celebration, and more! https://t.co/E0qURcEUXd

My dad always told me: family comes first.

That lesson has stayed with me my whole life—in my family, in my work, and in the way I try to show up for the people I serve.

Wishing a very happy Father’s Day to all the dads, grandfathers, stepdads, father figures, and caregivers https://t.co/hRSsiwRsTv

Today, I was honored to join our community to celebrate Juneteenth and learn more about the future African American Museum of Palm Beach County.

Places like this matter because they preserve history, elevate voices that have too often been overlooked, and ensure future https://t.co/HaCI86YAif

There’s nothing better than seeing federal dollars come home to strengthen our communities.

Proud to have helped secure more than $1 million for Greenacres’ new youth center, a space that will serve and support local kids for years to come. https://t.co/m1fn6oXDaS
Great to see @bebewinans, @EdmondsJervonte, and so many other friends tonight at the Kravis Center Gospel Gala! https://t.co/w5IowAfraE
https://t.co/VtbCHNIUCM

Today, I sent a letter to House Oversight Chairman @RepJamesComer and Ranking Member @RepRobertGarcia requesting a long overdue hearing with the Palm Beach County officials who failed to hold Epstein accountable.  
 
I'll keep pushing for transparency and justice for survivors.

Ten years ago today, 49 innocent lives were stolen at Pulse Nightclub in a horrific act of hate and gun violence.
 
As Pride Month and Gun Violence Awareness Month intersect, we remember those we lost, honor the survivors, and stand with the LGBTQ+ community.
 
Their legacy lives

I joined @RepD…

Antisemitism is on the rise, & Jewish Americans must feel safe to worship, gather, & live in their communities. 

Proud to help introduce the bipartisan Jewish American Security Act to strengthen security, combat antisemitism, & protect Jewish institutions from hate & violence.
https://t.co/DutgOm1mXc

For nearly three decades, Olga Perez has lived in PBC and contributed to our community.

Now, she is being forced to leave her four American kids behind.

Heartbreaking. Cruel. And not the focus on dangerous criminals Americans were promised.
https://t.co/bJ0zvyXBGV

Shame, shame, shame.

Not something to brag about. Ripping decent, hardworking people from their families and workplaces is nothing to be proud of.

https://t.co/O4sE8Y3XC2

Great to visit with our friends from the Everglades Foundation and talk about the billions in federal funding I’ve helped secure for projects to protect and restore one of Florida’s most treasured natural wonders. https://t.co/7JiCEEv650
🚨My amendment just passed to prohibit ICE from cruelly deporting people to countries which they have no connection🚨

When a doctor says a patient needs care, that should be the end of the story.

Instead, Medicare launched a pilot program that lets private companies use AI to second-guess physicians and delay treatment.

I’m proud my amendment to halt further funding for this scheme was https://t.co/gVQXbG2u8F
Early morning update. Grateful for coffee. https://t.co/sjWL4EqqWQ

Great to run into my friends @PPFA   I’ll always fight to protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. 

Thankful to Planned Parenthood for their continued commitment to this effort. https://t.co/EaMe9JB1tJ

This bill fails our nation’s women.

It cuts vital health care services: from preventive visits and birth control to cancer screenings and maternal health care.

And it slashes funding for women’s health research.

Women’s health matters. I’m fighting to protect it. https://t.co/BfiJZM24Ud

There’s a lot of love in Palm Beach County.

I was so proud to visit Compass, an LGBTQIA+ center in our community, to kick off Pride Month and celebrate the people who make our community stronger, kinder, and more welcoming.

Happy Pride Month to all! 🏳️‍🌈 https://t.co/rw8Juyo8Vf

My amendment passed with bipartisan support to require coordination with airports and real efforts to reduce the impact of long-term flight restrictions. 

When the FAA makes decisions that affect our communities, people deserve answers and airports deserve a seat at the table. https://t.co/5GEUyxkEdw

On Gun Violence Awareness Day, I’m wearing orange as a grandmother who worries every day about my grandchildren’s safety.  No child should have to live with the fear of gun violence. 

Thoughts and prayers are not enough. We need common sense action. https://t.co/hxhz9Mvajm

Two things can be true at once: the Iranian regime poses a serious threat, and the decision to go to war is too serious to leave to one person.

This week, the House finally voted to rein in Trump’s war.

I voted yes.

Today we celebrate the anniversary of the passage of the 19th Amendment and the brave women who fought like hell for the right to vote. 

They changed America for the better. Now it’s on us to protect that right for every voter.

Cavities hurt. So do dental bills. 
 Safe, low levels of fluoride in our drinking water keep these consequences at bay.
 Before EPA’s fluoride assessment guides decisions across the country, independent experts should review the evidence and make sure the science is sound. https://t.co/ht14vNKFTC

You can’t claim this is about “assimilation” while the Trump Administration is deporting our friends and neighbors - people who have lived here for years, raised families here, worked here, and strengthened our communities.

That is not serious immigration policy.

That is cruel https://t.co/77LZ5hw8yk

A child learning to paint. 
A family in a museum. 
Neighbors sitting together at a concert.
 
The Arts help us dream, remember, and feel connected.
 
In a country that badly needs connection, this budget that takes an axe to the arts gets our values wrong. https://t.co/LBxWZWSLwd

Congress provided $600M for Gavi to help deliver lifesaving vaccines to children around the world.

Those funds are still held up by a vaccine denier.

Our global health policy should follow science, the law, and Congress’ direction — not conspiracy theories.

Release the funds. https://t.co/32l4cX8ciz

The Trump Admin took a sledgehammer to USAID and the tools that keep America safe.   They gutted lifesaving health programs, weakened the State Department, and shrank America’s influence while our adversaries expanded theirs.   That looks like retreat, not leadership. https://t.co/EXNV6MNIX3

Pete Hegseth says he believes in “merit.”

But when qualified Navy officers earn promotions, he blocks them and tries to boost his own aide instead.

That’s politics and favoritism where they absolutely do not belong: in our military.
